name: @actflow/e2e
description: Headless golden-path end-to-end runner for ActFlow. Exercises the REAL package code (ENS identity assembly, ERC-8004 reputation, x402 payment, Uniswap swap quote, World ID free-trial gating) in LABELED MOCK/FIXTURE mode — no funds or credentials required. Invoked by `pnpm hackathon:e2e`.

scripts.build: echo "@actflow/e2e: nothing to build (runner is plain ESM)"
